name: promptir
description: Optimizes raw developer prompts using native AI models.

chatParticipants.name: promptir
chatParticipants.description: Optimize raw coding prompts with active editor context.

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Optimize a raw prompt using the active editor context.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Prepare a bug-review prompt using the active editor context.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Prepare an explanation prompt for the active file or selection.

commands.name: problems
commands.description: Prepare a prompt focused on current VS Code Problems diagnostics.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Prepare a planning-only prompt without asking for code edits.

promptir.aiProvider.description: Select the AI provider to use. 'Copilot' uses the native VS Code LM API. 'OpenAI' uses a custom API key.

promptir.openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI API key (if using OpenAI provider). Leave blank to use Copilot.

promptir.openaiModel.description: The OpenAI model to use (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini).

promptir.maxContextChars.description: Maximum total characters of gathered workspace context (active file, Graphify map, related files, diagnostics) sent to the AI model in a single request. Lower this if you hit a 'message exceeds token limit' style error from the AI provider.

promptir.graphify.autoReindex.description: Silently rebuild Graphify index files incrementally on text document saves.

promptir.graphify.maxDepth.description: Maximum number of connected nodes to pull into context.

promptir.grepai.enabled.description: Use grepai for semantic code search when gathering context for prompt-aware presets. Falls back to keyword-based search automatically when grepai is unavailable.

promptir.grepai.maxResults.description: Maximum number of semantic search hits to request from grepai per prompt.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
